Railroad Worker Obi:
When the air railroad project was cancelled, one Dwarf disobeyed the order and started to fight for the right to continue the work. Now he's the one who controls Mighty Chaos Golem.
It's the strongest golem of Plunderous Plains.
Each time it appears somewhere, we record the place of its appearance, but, unfortunately, we couldn't find any predicted pattern.
The only thing we know for sure is its appearance time: at 13:00, 16:00, and 20:00. Also, the golem disappears after 20 minutes. If you want to destroy it, you'd better hurry!
